response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly capable Staff Software Engineer with strong distributed systems expertise, he lacks the executive leadership and specialized AI architecture experience required for this CTO role. He does not meet the hard requirements of 5+ years in senior technical leadership, scaling teams from 10 to 30+ engineers, or operating production-grade multi-agent AI systems in high-stakes financial environments.
strengths: Extensive 15+ year background in software engineering, including high-throughput microservices and distributed systems.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative as the founder of an open-source, event-driven Geo-Data platform.
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
concerns: Zero executive leadership experience; lacks the required 5+ years in senior technical leadership roles at scale-ups.
No demonstrated experience scaling engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people or governing external delivery partners.
Agentic AI experience is very brief (one month) and lacks the depth required to architect complex, stateful multi-agent systems.
